name: Light Pill #1 - The Silent Witness
description: The Silent Witness - A glowing capsule that grants the power of absolute observation to those who dare to remain silent. Part of the Light Pill Project: surreal, mystical experiences for those who embrace the unknown.

attributes.value: Charcoal grey silk tunic with hidden pockets
Truth reveals itself only to those who do not speak.
You must not speak from dusk till dawn. Record everything you observe with charcoal sticks. Your silence holds more power than any spell.
Complete silence for one hour prior

properties.ai_prompt: A mysterious and cinematic fashion editorial photo of 'The Silent Witness' from the Light Pill Project. An androgynous figure stands watchful in a charcoal grey silk tunic, holding a silver-bound journal, in a circular ancient library with floating candles. Obsidian Shadow aura with Still Water energy, cinematic lighting emphasizing shadows and observation, dark academic atmosphere, photorealistic, 8K, detailed.
